title: Generative AI Hackathon
description: Form teams, build autonomous agent solutions using LLMs, and pitch to leading tech founders for capital.
outcomes: Build a working LLM agent with UI and database connectivity.
Get direct mentoring from top AI engineers and tech founders.
Pitch to early-stage venture capitalists for project funding.
Receive participation certificate and exclusive developer swag.

title: Full Stack MERN Workshop
description: An intensive hands-on session building and deploying high-performance database-driven REST API backends.
outcomes: Master MongoDB schema design and Mongoose aggregate queries.
Build secure REST APIs using Express.js, JWT, and bcrypt.
Connect and manage state in React with advanced hooks.
Deploy backends to Render and frontends to Vercel.

title: Agentic AI Developer Webinar
description: Learn the mechanics of multi-agent system coordination using frameworks like LangChain, Autogen, and CrewAI.
outcomes: Understand the theory of AI agents, tools execution, and loops.
Write multi-agent workflows using CrewAI and LangGraph.
Deploy an autonomous researcher agent locally.
Receive record stream access and session source files.

title: Smart IoT & Telemetry Hackathon
description: Deploy telemetry data loggers on ESP32 microcontrollers, connect them to MQTT brokers, and design dashboards.
outcomes: Interface analog and digital sensors with ESP32 boards.
Establish active TCP client socket connections to MQTT brokers.
Design real-time analytical dashboards using Node-RED and Grafana.
Compete for the Best Smart City IoT Solution award.

title: Embedded C Firmware Workshop
description: Deep-dive into timer hardware interrupts, peripheral bus routing (I2C, SPI), and real-time operating systems.
outcomes: Configure peripheral clocks and GPIO registers on STM32 ARM cores.
Write non-blocking interrupt-driven driver routines in C.
Implement multitasking using FreeRTOS tasks and queues.
Hands-on debugging with logic analyzers and oscilloscopes.

title: AI Product Strategy Workshop
description: Master product roadmapping, user testing patterns, and writing data-driven PRDs utilizing AI co-pilots.
outcomes: Draft comprehensive PRDs using advanced AI prompts.
Design metrics track systems and customer journey logs.
Run automated mock customer feedback loops using LLMs.
Get templates for standard AI-powered product roadmaps.

title: Advanced Business Analytics Webinar
description: Learn complex cohort query building, database modeling, and operational dash tracking with Tableau.
outcomes: Model relational tables for cohort retention queries.
Build live interactive dashboard grids tracking company KPI runs.
Learn predictive sales modeling algorithms in Tableau.
Obtain course completion badge and dashboard template packs.

title: Web 3.0 Workshop
description: A deep dive session into writing decentralized smart contracts, gas price calculations, and MetaMask wallet interfaces.
outcomes: Wrote and deployed Solidity smart contracts on testnets.
Integrated dApp frontends with Ethers.js and MetaMask.
Learned vulnerability patterns like reentrancy attacks.

title: IoT Node Routing Sprint
description: 36-hour continuous hardware routing sprint designing smart mesh nodes with ESP-NOW and Bluetooth mesh layers.
outcomes: Configured automatic routing layers between 15 active nodes.
Developed local data packets storage rules during network drops.
Successfully demonstrated smart home mesh network control.

title: Cloud Deployments Bootcamp
description: 5-day boot camp on microservice architectures, writing Dockerfiles, defining Kubernetes pods, and setting up CI/CD actions.
outcomes: Containerized existing MERN web projects.
Created automated GitHub Actions flows building Docker images.
Deployed resilient workloads on Kubernetes clusters.
